rules.title: Route handler return may not match response_model
rules.description: A FastAPI route declares a response_model but the return statement constructs a dict or object whose keys don't align with the Pydantic model fields defined in the same file or imports.
rules.impact: FastAPI will raise a validation error at runtime when returned data doesn't match the response_model.
rules.suggestedFix: Ensure the return dict/object keys match all required fields of the response_model Pydantic class.

rules.title: Depends() references function not found in imports
rules.description: A Depends() call references a callable that is not imported or defined in the current file. The dependency injection will fail at startup.
rules.impact: FastAPI app will fail to start or the endpoint will crash when the dependency cannot be resolved.
rules.suggestedFix: Import the referenced dependency function or define it in the current file.

rules.title: POST/PUT endpoint missing response_model
rules.description: A POST or PUT route handler does not declare a response_model parameter. Without it, FastAPI won't validate or document the response shape, and clients won't know what to expect.
rules.impact: No response validation or OpenAPI documentation for write endpoints. Clients may receive unexpected shapes.
rules.suggestedFix: Add response_model=YourPydanticModel to the route decorator.

rules.title: CORS allows all origins or misconfigured
rules.description: CORSMiddleware is configured with allow_origins=['*'] or the origins list doesn't match typical frontend URL patterns (localhost for dev, actual domain for prod).
rules.impact: Wildcard CORS allows any website to make authenticated requests to your API, enabling CSRF-like attacks.
rules.suggestedFix: Replace '*' with specific allowed origins. Use environment variables for different environments.

rules.title: Background task function may not be async or awaited
rules.description: A BackgroundTasks.add_task() call references a function that is not defined as async, or an async function within a route is called without await.
rules.impact: Background tasks may block the event loop or silently fail without proper async handling.
rules.suggestedFix: Ensure background task functions are async if they do I/O, and that async calls within routes use await.
